"cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary
The `/api/v1/files/images/{flow_id}/{file_name}` endpoint serves image files without any authentication or ownership check. Any unauthenticated request with a known flow_id and file_name returns the image with HTTP 200.

### Details
`src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/files.py:138-164` — `download_image` takes `flow_id`: UUID as a bare path parameter with no Depends(get_flow) or `CurrentActiveUser`. All other file routes (`download_file`, `upload_file`, `list_files`, `delete_file`) use `Depends(get_flow)` which enforces both authentication and ownership. There is no global auth middleware on /api/v1; protection is per-endpoint only.

### PoC
```
curl -v "http://localhost:7860/api/v1/files/images/<flow_uuid>/<filename.png>"
# Returns HTTP 200 with image bytes, no auth header required
```

### Impact
Unauthenticated cross-tenant data leak. In a multi-tenant deployment, any attacker who can discover or guess a `flow_id` (UUIDs can be leaked through other API responses) can download any user's uploaded images without credentials.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.05838, "percentile": 0.92212}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7grx-3xcx-2xv5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-20T20:47:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7grx-3xcx-2xv5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7grx-3xcx-2xv5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33484"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-24T14:16:30Z", "published_at": "2026-03-20T20:47:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/security/advisories/GHSA-7grx-3xcx-2xv5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33484", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/langflow/PYSEC-2026-80.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7grx-3xcx-2xv5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/langflow-ai/langflow/security-advisories/GHSA-7grx-3xcx-2xv5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow", "summary": "langflow has Unauthenticated IDOR on Image Downloads", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-06T00:56:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7grx-3xcx-2xv5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.9.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "langflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.0.0, < 1.9.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: langflow has Unauthenticated IDOR on Image Downloads
